ogTitle: Moonee Beach vs Mooney Mooney: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Moonee Beach and Mooney Mooney.
heading: Moonee Beach vs Mooney Mooney — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Moonee Beach, New South Wales and Mooney Mooney, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mooney Mooney has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Moonee Beach (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Moonee Beach or Mooney Mooney safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Moonee Beach has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Mooney Mooney scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Moonee Beach scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Mooney Mooney scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Moonee Beach or Mooney Mooney?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mooney Mooney has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
